Name: Pulser Labs
Desc:
3-piece set effect: Wearer's Arts Intensity <@ba.vup>+30</>. 
After the wearer applies <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>, the wearer gains <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</><@ba.vup> +50.0%</> for 10s. After the wearer applies <#ba.frozen>Solidification</>, the wearer gains <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</><@ba.vup> +50.0%</> for 10s. The aforementioned effects cannot stack.
